entries.script_line: Most people think they need more discipline. They don't.
I built this in a weekend and it saves me six hours a week.
Every short-form creator I know spends more time editing than filming.
You can batch-film for an hour and still run out of content in three days.
So I pre-edit every clip once, then a tool re-assembles them into dozens of variations.
One afternoon of filming becomes weeks of posts, because an LLM picks the clip order for me.
If this sounds useful, follow for more — I'm open-sourcing the whole pipeline.
Link in bio if you want to try it yourself.
